To solve the problem, policy gradient reinforcement learning is introduced to learn from scratch. Experimental results demonstrate that E2EMap can achieve up to 2.23 x mapping quality across different CGRA settings while consuming even less compilation time as compared to state-of-the-art works.
items.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构阵列（CGRA）是一种很有前途的架构，可以应对高性能和高能效需求不断增长的挑战。然而，CGRA 的实际实现性能高度依赖于映射器。使用启发式或组合优化的传统映射器很难从过去的经验中学习，质量和可移植性较差。最近，机器学习被引入到CGRA编译器中的部分组件，而将其他组件留给传统的启发式方法，这也容易出现次优的情况。为此，本文提出了一种用于CGRA映射的端到端学习框架E2EMap，可以覆盖完整的映射过程。为了降低学习模型的复杂性，提出了反向映射问题，可以彻底探索各种路由策略。为了解决这个问题，引入了策略梯度强化学习，从头开始学习。实验结果表明，与最先进的作品相比，E2EMap 可以在不同的 CGRA 设置下实现高达 2.23 倍的映射质量，同时消耗的编译时间甚至更少。

items.title: SPARK: Scalable and Precision-Aware Acceleration of Neural Networks via Efficient Encoding.
items.abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have demonstrated remarkable success; however, their increasing model size poses a challenge due to the widening gap between model size and hardware capacity. To address this, model compression techniques have been proposed, but existing compression methods struggle to effectively handle the significant parameter variations (activations and weights) within the model. Moreover, current variance-aware encoding solutions for compression introduce complex logic, leading to limited compression benefits and hardware efficiency. In this context, we present SPARK, a novel algorithm/architecture co-designed solution that utilizes variable-length data representation for local parameter value processing, offering low hardware overhead and high-performance gains. Our key insight is that the high-order part in quantized values are often sparse, allowing us to employ an identity bit to assign the appropriate encoding length, thereby eliminating redundant bit-length footprints. This reduction in data representation based on data characteristics enables a serialized structured data encoding scheme that seamlessly integrates with existing hardware accelerators, such as systolic arrays. We evaluate SPARK-based accelerators against some existing encoding-based accelerator, and our results demonstrate significant improvements. The SPARK-based accelerator achieves up to 4.65 × speedup and 74.7% energy reduction, while maintaining superior model accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）已经取得了显着的成功；然而，由于模型大小和硬件容量之间的差距不断扩大，模型大小的增加带来了挑战。为了解决这个问题，已经提出了模型压缩技术，但是现有的压缩方法难以有效地处理模型内的显着参数变化（激活和权重）。此外，当前用于压缩的方差感知编码解决方案引入了复杂的逻辑，导致压缩优势和硬件效率有限。在此背景下，我们提出了 SPARK，这是一种新颖的算法/架构共同设计的解决方案，它利用可变长度数据表示进行本地参数值处理，提供低硬件开销和高性能增益。我们的主要见解是，量化值中的高阶部分通常是稀疏的，这使得我们能够使用同一位来分配适当的编码长度，从而消除冗余的位长度足迹。这种基于数据特征的数据表示形式的减少使得序列化结构化数据编码方案能够与现有硬件加速器（例如脉动阵列）无缝集成。我们将基于 SPARK 的加速器与一些现有的基于编码的加速器进行评估，我们的结果表明了显着的改进。基于 SPARK 的加速器可实现高达 4.65 倍的加速和 74.7% 的能耗降低，同时保持卓越的模型精度。

items.title: TinyTS: Memory-Efficient TinyML Model Compiler Framework on Microcontrollers.
items.abstract: Deploying deep neural network (DNN) models on Microcontroller Units (MCUs) is typically limited by the tightness of the SRAM memory budget. Previously, machine learning system frameworks often allocated tensor memory layer-wise, but this will result in out-of-memory exceptions when a DNN model includes a large tensor. Patch-based inference, another past solution, reduces peak SRAM memory usage by dividing a tensor into small patches and storing one small patch at a time. However, executing these overlapping small patches requires significantly more time to complete the inference and is undesirable for MCUs. We resolve these problems by developing a novel DNN model compiler: TinyTS. In the TinyTS, our tensor partition method creates a tensor-splitting model that eliminates the redundant computation observed in the patch-based inference. Furthermore, the TinyTS memory planner significantly reduces peak SRAM memory usage by releasing the memory space of unused split tensors for other ready split tensors early before the completion of the entire tensor. Finally, TinyTS presents different optimization techniques to eliminate the metadata storage and runtime overhead when executing multiple fine-grained split tensors. Using the TensorFlow Lite for Microcontroller (TFLM) framework as a baseline, we tested the effectiveness of TinyTS. We found that TinyTS reduces the peak SRAM memory usage of 9 TinyML models up to 5.92X over the baseline. TinyTS also achieves a geometric mean of 8.83X speedup over the patch-based inference. In resolving the two key issues when deploying DNN models on MCUs, TinyTS substantially boosts memory usage efficiency for TinyML applications. The source code of TinyTS can be obtained from https://github.com/nycu-caslab/TinyTS
items.abstract_zh: 在微控制器单元 (MCU) 上部署深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型通常受到 SRAM 内存预算紧张的限制。此前，机器学习系统框架通常会逐层分配张量内存，但当 DNN 模型包含较大张量时，这会导致内存不足的异常。基于补丁的推理是另一种过去的解决方案，它通过将张量划分为小补丁并一次存储一个小补丁来减少峰值 SRAM 内存使用量。然而，执行这些重叠的小补丁需要更多的时间来完成推理，这对于 MCU 来说是不可取的。我们通过开发一种新颖的 DNN 模型编译器来解决这些问题：TinyTS。在 TinyTS 中，我们的张量分割方法创建了一个张量分割模型，消除了基于补丁的推理中观察到的冗余计算。此外，TinyTS 内存规划器通过在整个张量完成之前尽早释放未使用的分割张量的内存空间以用于其他就绪的分割张量，显着降低了峰值 SRAM 内存使用量。最后，TinyTS 提出了不同的优化技术，以消除执行多个细粒度分割张量时的元数据存储和运行时开销。使用 TensorFlow Lite for Microcontroller (TFLM) 框架作为基准，我们测试了 TinyTS 的有效性。我们发现 TinyTS 将 9 个 TinyML 模型的峰值 SRAM 内存使用量降低了基线的 5.92 倍。 TinyTS 还比基于补丁的推理实现了 8.83 倍的几何平均加速。 TinyTS解决了在MCU上部署DNN模型时的两个关键问题，极大地提高了TinyML应用程序的内存使用效率。 TinyTS的源代码可以从https://github.com/nycu-caslab/TinyTS获取

items.title: CHROME: Concurrency-Aware Holistic Cache Management Framework with Online Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract: Cache management is a critical aspect of computer architecture, encompassing techniques such as cache replacement, bypassing, and prefetching. Existing research has often focused on individual techniques, overlooking the potential benefits of joint optimization. Moreover, many of these approaches rely on static and intuition-driven policies, limiting their performance under complex and dynamic workloads. To address these challenges, this paper introduces CHROME, a novel concurrencyaware cache management framework. CHROME takes a holistic approach by seamlessly integrating intelligent cache replacement and bypassing with pattern-based prefetching. By leveraging online reinforcement learning, CHROME dynamically adapts cache decisions based on multiple program features and applies a reward for each decision that considers the accuracy of the action and the system-level feedback information. Our performance evaluation demonstrates that CHROME outperforms current state-of-the-art schemes, exhibiting significant improvements in cache management. Notably, CHROME achieves a remarkable performance boost of up to 13.7% over the traditional LRU method in multi-core systems with only modest overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 缓存管理是计算机体系结构的一个关键方面，包括缓存替换、旁路和预取等技术。现有的研究通常集中于单独的技术，忽视了联合优化的潜在好处。此外，许多这些方法依赖于静态和直觉驱动的策略，限制了它们在复杂和动态工作负载下的性能。为了应对这些挑战，本文介绍了 CHROME，一种新颖的并发感知缓存管理框架。 CHROME 采用整体方法，将智能缓存替换和绕过与基于模式的预取无缝集成。通过利用在线强化学习，CHROME 可以根据多个程序功能动态调整缓存决策，并为考虑操作准确性和系统级反馈信息的每个决策应用奖励。我们的性能评估表明，CHROME 的性能优于当前最先进的方案，在缓存管理方面表现出显着的改进。值得注意的是，在多核系统中，CHROME 比传统 LRU 方法实现了高达 13.7% 的显着性能提升，而开销却很小。

items.title: Rapper: A Parameter-Aware Repair-in-Memory Accelerator for Blockchain Storage Platform.
items.abstract: Blockchain storage platforms reward storage nodes for keeping user-uploaded data for a certain amount of time. These storage nodes are unstable and can go online or offline unpredictably at any time, leading to potential data loss. To prevent data loss, blockchain storage platforms adopt erasure codes on user-uploaded encrypted data. Data repair processes will be performed to recover the lost data. However, the data repair processes heavily rely on time-consuming erasure coding algorithms, mainly consisting of vector-matrix multiplications. The emerging processing-in-memory technique can efficiently speed up the processing of vector-matrix multiplications. It can be integrated into blockchain storage platforms to solve the data repair issue. This paper presents Rapper, a parameter-aware repair-inmemory accelerator for blockchain storage platforms. Rapper utilizes the computing power of emerging processing-in-memory architecture so that data repair processes can be processed in a parallel manner and the overall efficiency can be improved significantly. Specifically, at the hardware level, the ReRAM memory is reorganized into our proposed double bank, XRU, XGroup, and ReRAM crossbars structure. At the software level, a parallel decoding/encoding strategy is proposed to fully exploit the internal parallelism of ReRAM. We also propose an adaptive parameter-aware mapping to handle various sizes of stripes. To demonstrate the viability of the proposed technique, a representative blockchain storage project Storj is adopted as the default storage infrastructure. Experimental results show that Rapper can achieve a 1.96 × speedup on average compared to the representative scheme.
items.abstract_zh: 区块链存储平台奖励存储节点将用户上传的数据保留一定时间。这些存储节点不稳定，随时可能出现不可预测的上线或下线，导致潜在的数据丢失。为了防止数据丢失，区块链存储平台对用户上传的加密数据采用纠删码。将执行数据修复过程以恢复丢失的数据。然而，数据修复过程严重依赖耗时的纠删码算法，主要包括向量矩阵乘法。新兴的内存处理技术可以有效地加速向量矩阵乘法的处理。可以集成到区块链存储平台中，解决数据修复问题。本文介绍了 Rapper，一种用于区块链存储平台的参数感知内存修复加速器。 Rapper利用新兴的内存处理架构的计算能力，使得数据修复过程可以并行处理，整体效率可以显着提高。具体来说，在硬件层面，ReRAM 存储器被重组为我们提出的双存储体、XRU、XGroup 和 ReRAM 交叉结构。在软件层面，提出了并行解码/编码策略，以充分利用ReRAM的内部并行性。我们还提出了一种自适应参数感知映射来处理各种尺寸的条纹。为了证明所提出技术的可行性，采用具有代表性的区块链存储项目 Storj 作为默认存储基础设施。实验结果表明，与代表性方案相比，Rapper 平均可以实现 1.96 倍的加速。

items.title: Stellar: Energy-Efficient and Low-Latency SNN Algorithm and Hardware Co-Design with Spatiotemporal Computation.
items.abstract: The brain-inspired Spiking Neural Network (SNN) has great potential to reduce energy consumption in AI applications. However, the state-of-the-art SNN algorithms focus on high accuracy and large sparsity by constructing complex neuron models with sparse spike generation, leading to low energy efficiency and high latency. The state-of-the-art SNN hardware designs are hard to exploit high data reuse and parallel processing dataflows due to the irregularity and time-dependency of the spikes. To address the above issues, in this work we propose STELLAR, an algorithm-hardware co-design framework exploiting rich spatiotemporal dynamics of the SNN for high energy efficiency and low latency while maintaining high accuracy. Firstly, based on the Few Spikes (FS) neuron, we propose few spikes backpropagation (FSBP) and its training flow with strong hardware awareness to adaptively train the deep SNN for a short time window and few spikes. The resulting sparse SNN enjoys rapid inference with few synaptic operations and competitive accuracy. Secondly, we propose a dedicated SNN architecture and spatiotemporal Row Stationary (stRS) dataflow to exploit large sparsity brought by the proposed algorithm for highly parallel and energy -efficient computation. Several techniques have been proposed to boost energy efficiency and speedup while maintaining accuracy, including the window-based parallel processing technique and the spatiotemporal encoding-based computation architecture. The experimental results show that 1) on the algorithm level, STELLAR outperforms the state-of-the-art SNN models with significantly fewer spikes and shorter time window on both static and neuromorphic datasets with higher or comparable accuracy; 2) on the architecture level, compared with several SOTA SNN hardware designs, STELLAR achieves up to 8.1 × energy efficiency and 7.1 × speedup.
items.abstract_zh: 受大脑启发的尖峰神经网络（SNN）在降低人工智能应用中的能耗方面具有巨大潜力。然而，最先进的 SNN 算法通过构建具有稀疏尖峰生成的复杂神经元模型来关注高精度和大稀疏性，从而导致低能量效率和高延迟。由于尖峰的不规则性和时间依赖性，最先进的 SNN 硬件设计很难利用高数据重用和并行处理数据流。为了解决上述问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了 STELLAR，一种算法-硬件协同设计框架，利用 SNN 丰富的时空动态来实现高能效和低延迟，同时保持高精度。首先，基于少尖峰（FS）神经元，我们提出少尖峰反向传播（FSBP）及其具有强大硬件意识的训练流程，以自适应地训练短时间窗口和少尖峰的深度 SNN。由此产生的稀疏 SNN 具有快速推理、很少的突触操作和具有竞争力的准确性。其次，我们提出了专用的 SNN 架构和时空行固定（stRS）数据流，以利用所提出的算法带来的大稀疏性进行高度并行和节能计算。人们提出了几种技术来提高能源效率和加速，同时保持精度，包括基于窗口的并行处理技术和基于时空编码的计算架构。实验结果表明：1）在算法层面，STELLAR 优于最先进的 SNN 模型，在静态和神经形态数据集上具有显着更少的尖峰和更短的时间窗口，并且具有更高或相当的精度； 2）在架构层面，与几种SOTA SNN硬件设计相比，STELLAR实现了高达8.1×的能效和7.1×的加速比。

items.title: MIRAGE: Quantum Circuit Decomposition and Routing Collaborative Design Using Mirror Gates.
items.abstract: Building efficient large-scale quantum computers is a significant challenge due to limited qubit connectivities and noisy hardware operations. Transpilation is critical to ensure that quantum gates are on physically linked qubits, while minimizing SWAP gates and simultaneously finding efficient decomposition into native basis gates. The goal of this multifaceted optimization step is typically to minimize circuit depth and to achieve the best possible execution fidelity. In this work, we propose MIRAGE, a collaborative design and transpilation approach to minimize SWAP gates while improving decomposition using mirror gates. Mirror gates utilize the same underlying physical interactions, but when their outputs are reversed, they realize a different or mirrored quantum operation. Given the recent attention to √iSWAP as a powerful basis gate with decomposition advantages over CNOT, we show how systems that implement the iSWAP family of gates can particularly benefit from mirror gates. Further, MIRAGE uses mirror gates to reduce routing pressure and reduce true circuit depth instead of just minimizing SWAPs. We explore the benefits of decomposition for √iSWAP and 4√SWAP using mirror gates, including both expanding Haar coverage and conducting a detailed fault rate analysis trading off circuit depth against approximate gate decomposition. We also describe a novel greedy approach accepting mirror substitution at different aggression levels within MIRAGE. For iSWAP systems that use square-lattice topologies, MIRAGE provides an average of 29.6% reduction in circuit depth by eliminating an average of 59.9% SWAP gates, with a relative decrease in infidelity of 28%. MIRAGE also improves circuit depth and decreases relative infidelity by 25% and 21 % for CNOT-based and 23% and 19% SYC-based machines, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 由于有限的量子位连接和嘈杂的硬件操作，构建高效的大规模量子计算机是一项重大挑战。转译对于确保量子门位于物理连接的量子位上、同时最大限度地减少交换门并同时找到有效分解为本机基础门至关重要。这种多方面优化步骤的目标通常是最小化电路深度并实现最佳的执行保真度。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MIRAGE，一种协作设计和转译方法，可最大限度地减少交换门，同时使用镜像门改进分解。镜像门利用相同的底层物理相互作用，但当它们的输出反转时，它们会实现不同的或镜像的量子操作。鉴于最近人们对 √iSWAP 作为强大的基础门的关注，其分解优势优于 CNOT，我们展示了实现 iSWAP 系列门的系统如何特别受益于镜像门。此外，MIRAGE 使用镜像门来减少布线压力并减少真实电路深度，而不仅仅是最小化交换。我们探索使用镜像门分解 √iSWAP 和 4√SWAP 的好处，包括扩大 Haar 覆盖范围和进行详细的故障率分析，权衡电路深度与近似门分解。我们还描述了一种新颖的贪婪方法，在 MIRAGE 中接受不同攻击级别的镜像替换。对于使用方点阵拓扑的 iSWAP 系统，MIRAGE 通过消除平均 59.9% 的 SWAP 门，使电路深度平均减少 29.6%，不保真度相对减少 28%。对于基于 CNOT 的机器以及基于 SYC 的机器，MIRAGE 还改善了电路深度并将相对不真实性分别降低了 25% 和 21% 和 23% 和 19%。

items.title: Usas: A Sustainable Continuous-Learning' Framework for Edge Servers.
items.abstract: Edge servers have recently become very popular for performing localized analytics, especially on video, as they reduce data traffic and protect privacy. However, due to their resource constraints, these servers often employ compressed models, which are typically prone to data drift. Consequently, for edge servers to provide cloud-comparable quality, they must also perform continuous learning to mitigate this drift. However, at expected deployment scales, performing continuous training on every edge server is not sustainable due to their aggregate power demands on grid supply and associated sustainability footprints. To address these challenges, we propose Us<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">.</inf>as,´ an approach combining algorithmic adjustments, hardware-software co-design, and morphable acceleration hardware to enable the training of workloads on these edge servers to be powered by renewable, but intermittent, solar power that can sustainably scale alongside data sources. Our evaluation of Us<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">.</inf>as on a real-world´ traffic dataset indicates that our continuous learning approach simultaneously improves both accuracy and efficiency: Us<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">.</inf>as´ offers a 4.96% greater mean accuracy than prior approaches while our morphable accelerator that adapts to solar variance can save up to {234.95kWH, 2.63MWH}/year/edge-server compared to a {DNN accelerator, data center scale GPU}, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 边缘服务器最近在执行本地化分析（尤其是视频分析）方面变得非常流行，因为它们可以减少数据流量并保护隐私。然而，由于资源限制，这些服务器通常采用压缩模型，这通常容易出现数据漂移。因此，为了使边缘服务器提供与云相当的质量，它们还必须执行持续学习以减轻这种漂移。然而，在预期的部署规模下，由于对电网供应的总电力需求和相关的可持续性足迹，在每台边缘服务器上执行连续训练是不可持续的。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种将算法调整、硬件-软件协同设计和可变形加速硬件相结合的方法，使这些边缘服务器上的工作负载训练能够由可再生但间歇性的太阳能供电，与数据源一起可持续扩展。我们对 Us<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">.</inf> 的评估表明，我们的持续学习方法同时提高了准确性和效率：Us<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">。</inf>as´ 的平均准确度比之前的方法提高了 4.96%，而我们适应太阳变化的可变形加速器与分别为{DNN 加速器、数据中心规模 GPU}。

items.title: Supporting Secure Multi-GPU Computing with Dynamic and Batched Metadata Management.
items.abstract: With growing problem sizes for GPU computing, multi-GPU systems with fine-grained memory sharing have emerged to improve the current coarse-grained unified memory support based on page migration. Such multi-GPU systems with shared memory pose a new challenge in securing CPU-GPU and inter-GPU communications, as the cost of secure data transfers adds a significant performance overhead. There are two overheads of secure communication in multi-GPU systems: First, extra overhead is added to generate one-time pads (OTPs) for authenticated encryption. Second, the security metadata such as MACs and counters passed along with encrypted data consume precious network bandwidth. This study investigates the performance impact of secure communication in multi-GPU systems and evaluates the prior CPU-oriented OTP precomputation schemes adapted for multi-GPU systems. Our investigation identifies the challenge with the limited OTP buffers for inter-GPU communication and the opportunity to reduce traffic for security meta-data with bursty communications in GPUs. Based on the analysis, this paper proposes a new dynamic OTP buffer allocation technique, which adjusts the buffer assignment for each source-destination pair to reflect the communication patterns. To address the bandwidth problem by extra security metadata, the study employs a dynamic batching scheme to transfer only a single set of metadata for each batched group of data responses. The proposed design constantly tracks the communication pattern from each GPU, periodically adjusts the allocated buffer size, and dynamically forms batches of data transfers. Our evaluation shows that in a 16-GPU system, the proposed scheme can improve the performance by 13.2 % and 17.5 % on average from the prior cached and private schemes, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 随着GPU计算问题规模的不断扩大，细粒度内存共享的多GPU系统应运而生，以改善当前基于页面迁移的粗粒度统一内存支持。这种具有共享内存的多 GPU 系统对保护 CPU-GPU 和 GPU 间通信的安全提出了新的挑战，因为安全数据传输的成本会显着增加性能开销。多 GPU 系统中的安全通信有两个开销：首先，会添加额外的开销来生成用于验证加密的一次性密码本 (OTP)。其次，与加密数据一起传递的安全元数据（例如 MAC 和计数器）会消耗宝贵的网络带宽。本研究调查了多 GPU 系统中安全通信的性能影响，并评估了适用于多 GPU 系统的现有面向 CPU 的 OTP 预计算方案。我们的调查发现了 GPU 间通信的 OTP 缓冲区有限所面临的挑战，以及通过 GPU 中的突发通信减少安全元数据流量的机会。基于分析，本文提出了一种新的动态 OTP 缓冲区分配技术，该技术调整每个源-目标对的缓冲区分配以反映通信模式。为了通过额外的安全元数据解决带宽问题，该研究采用动态批处理方案，为每个批处理的数据响应组仅传输一组元数据。所提出的设计不断跟踪每个 GPU 的通信模式，定期调整分配的缓冲区大小，并动态形成批量数据传输。我们的评估表明，在 16-GPU 系统中，所提出的方案可以比之前的缓存方案和私有方案平均分别提高 13.2% 和 17.5% 的性能。

items.title: FlashGNN: An In-SSD Accelerator for GNN Training.
items.abstract: Recently, Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have emerged as powerful tools for data analysis, surpassing traditional algorithms in various applications. However, the growing size of real-world datasets has outpaced the capabilities of centralized CPU or G PU - based systems. To address this challenge, numerous distributed systems have been proposed. However, these systems suffer from low hardware utilization due to slow network data exchange. While SSDs provide a promising alternative with large capacity and improved access latency, SSD-based G NN training on a single computer is bottlenecked by slow PCIe bus data transfer. This bottleneck leads to low CPU and G PU utilization, as confirmed by our experiments. Moreover, the design of in-SSD GNN training is hindered by slow access to flash memory. FlashGNN is a proposed solution that overcomes the PCIe bottleneck, fully utilizes I/O parallelism in flash chips, and maximizes data reuse from fetched flash memory chunks for efficient GNN training. We achieve this by designing the SSD firmware to coordinate data movements and hardware unit access. To address design challenges arising from slow flash memory and limited resources, we propose a novel node-wise GNN training method, an efficient scheduling algorithm for flash requests, and a high-performance subgraph generation method. Experimental results demonstrate that FlashGNN outperforms Ginex, a state-of-the-art SSD-based GNN training system, with a speed-up ratio ranging from 4.89× to 11.83 × and achieves energy savings of 57.14 × to 192.66 × for four typical real-world graph datasets. Additionally, FlashGNN is up to 23.17 × more efficient than the enhanced state-of-the-art in-storage accelerator, SmartSAGE+.
items.abstract_zh: 最近，图神经网络（GNN）已成为强大的数据分析工具，在各种应用中超越了传统算法。然而，现实世界数据集规模的不断增长已经超出了基于集中式 CPU 或 GPU 的系统的能力。为了应对这一挑战，人们提出了许多分布式系统。然而，由于网络数据交换缓慢，这些系统的硬件利用率较低。虽然 SSD 提供了一种有前途的替代方案，具有大容量和改善的访问延迟，但在单台计算机上基于 SSD 的 G NN 训练受到缓慢的 PCIe 总线数据传输的瓶颈。正如我们的实验所证实的，这个瓶颈导致 CPU 和 G PU 利用率低。此外，SSD 内 GNN 训练的设计受到闪存访问速度慢的阻碍。 FlashGNN 是一种提出的解决方案，它克服了 PCIe 瓶颈，充分利用闪存芯片中的 I/O 并行性，并最大限度地重用获取的闪存块中的数据，以实现高效的 GNN 训练。我们通过设计 SSD 固件来协调数据移动和硬件单元访问来实现这一目标。为了解决慢速闪存和有限资源带来的设计挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的节点式 GNN 训练方法、一种针对闪存请求的高效调度算法和一种高性能子图生成方法。实验结果表明，FlashGNN 的性能优于 Ginex（一种最先进的基于 SSD 的 GNN 训练系统），加速比范围为 4.89 × 至 11.83 ×，并针对四个典型的现实世界图数据集实现了 57.14 × 至 192.66 × 的节能。此外，FlashGNN 的效率比增强型最先进的存储内加速器 SmartSAGE+ 高出 23.17 倍。

items.title: MIMDRAM: An End-to-End Processing-Using-DRAM System for High-Throughput, Energy-Efficient and Programmer-Transparent Multiple-Instruction Multiple-Data Computing.
items.abstract: Processing-using-DRAM (PUD) is a processing-in-memory (PIM) approach that uses a DRAM array's massive internal parallelism to execute very-wide (e.g., 16,384-262,144-bit-wide) data-parallel operations, in a single-instruction multiple-data (SIMD) fashion. However, DRAM rows' large and rigid granularity limit the effectiveness and applicability of PUD in three ways. First, since applications have varying degrees of SIMD parallelism (which is often smaller than the DRAM row granularity), PUD execution often leads to underutilization, through-put loss, and energy waste. Second, due to the high area cost of implementing interconnects that connect columns in a wide DRAM row, most PUD architectures are limited to the execution of parallel map operations, where a single operation is performed over equally-sized input and output arrays. Third, the need to feed the wide DRAM row with tens of thousands of data elements combined with the lack of adequate compiler support for PUD systems create a programmability barrier, since programmers need to manually extract SIMD parallelism from an application and map computation to the PUD hardware. Our goal is to design a flexible PUD system that overcomes the limitations caused by the large and rigid granularity of PUD. To this end, we propose MIMDRAM, a hardware/software co-designed PUD system that introduces new mechanisms to allocate and control only the necessary resources for a given PUD operation. The key idea of MIMDRAM is to leverage fine-grained DRAM (i.e., the ability to independently access smaller segments of a large DRAM row) for PUD computation. MIMDRAM exploits this key idea to enable a multiple-instruction multiple-data (MIMD) execution model in each DRAM subarray (and SIMD execution within each DRAM row segment). We evaluate MIMDRAM using twelve real-world applications and 495 multi-programmed application mixes. Our evaluation shows that MIMDRAM provides 34 × the performance, 14.3 × the energy efficiency, 1.7 × the throughput, and 1.3 × the fairness of a state-of-the-art PUD framework, along with 30.6 × and 6.8 × the energy efficiency of a high-end CPU and GPU, respectively. MIMDRAM adds small area cost to a DRAM chip (1.11%) and CPU die (0.6%). We hope and believe that MIMDRAM's ideas and results will help to enable more efficient and easy-to-program PUD systems. To this end, we open source MIMDRAM at https://glthub.com/CMU-SAFARI/MIMDRAM.
items.abstract_zh: 使用 DRAM 处理 (PUD) 是一种内存处理 (PIM) 方法，它使用 DRAM 阵列的大规模内部并行性以单指令多数据 (SIMD) 方式执行超宽（例如 16,384-262,144 位宽）数据并行操作。然而，DRAM 行的大而严格的粒度在三个方面限制了 PUD 的有效性和适用性。首先，由于应用程序具有不同程度的 SIMD 并行性（通常小于 DRAM 行粒度），PUD 执行通常会导致利用率不足、吞吐量损失和能源浪费。其次，由于实现连接宽 DRAM 行中的列的互连的面积成本很高，因此大多数 PUD 架构仅限于执行并行映射操作，其中单个操作在同等大小的输入和输出阵列上执行。第三，需要向宽 DRAM 行提供数以万计的数据元素，加上缺乏对 PUD 系统的足够编译器支持，造成了可编程性障碍，因为程序员需要手动从应用程序中提取 SIMD 并行性，并将计算映射到 PUD 硬件。我们的目标是设计一个灵活的PUD系统，克服PUD粒度大且刚性造成的限制。为此，我们提出了 MIMDRAM，这是一种硬件/软件共同设计的 PUD 系统，它引入了新的机制来仅分配和控制给定 PUD 操作所需的资源。 MIMDRAM 的关键思想是利用细粒度 DRAM（即独立访问大型 DRAM 行的较小段的能力）进行 PUD 计算。 MIMDRAM 利用这一关键思想在每个 DRAM 子阵列中启用多指令多数据 (MIMD) 执行模型（以及在每个 DRAM 行段内执行 SIMD）。我们使用 12 个实际应用程序和 495 个多编程应用程序组合来评估 MIMDRAM。我们的评估表明，MIMDRAM 提供了最先进 PUD 框架 34 倍的性能、14.3 倍的能效、1.7 倍的吞吐量和 1.3 倍的公平性，以及高端 CPU 和 GPU 的能效分别为 30.6 倍和 6.8 倍。 MIMDRAM 增加了 DRAM 芯片 (1.11%) 和 CPU 芯片 (0.6%) 的小面积成本。我们希望并相信 MIMDRAM 的想法和成果将有助于实现更高效、更易于编程的 PUD 系统。为此，我们在 https://glthub.com/CMU-SAFARI/MIMDRAM 上开源了 MIMDRAM。

items.title: An LPDDR-based CXL-PNM Platform for TCO-efficient Inference of Transformer-based Large Language Models.
items.abstract: Transformer-based large language models (LLMs) such as Generative Pre-trained Transformer (GPT) have become popular due to their remarkable performance across diverse applications, including text generation and translation. For LLM training and inference, the GPU has been the predominant accelerator with its pervasive software development ecosystem and powerful computing capability. However, as the size of LLMs keeps increasing for higher performance and/or more complex applications, a single GPU cannot efficiently accelerate LLM training and inference due to its limited memory capacity, which demands frequent transfers of the model parameters needed by the GPU to compute the current layer(s) from the host CPU memory/storage. A GPU appliance may provide enough aggregated memory capacity with multiple GPUs, but it suffers from frequent transfers of intermediate values among GPU devices, each accelerating specific layers of a given LLM. As the frequent transfers of these model parameters and intermediate values are performed over relatively slow device-to-device interconnects such as PCIe or NVLink, they become the key bottleneck for efficient acceleration of LLMs. Focusing on accelerating LLM inference, which is essential for many commercial services, we develop CXL-PNM, a processing near memory (PNM) platform based on the emerging interconnect technology, Compute eXpress Link (CXL). Specifically, we first devise an LPDDR5X-based CXL memory architecture with 512GB of capacity and 1.1TB/s of bandwidth, which boasts 16× larger capacity and 10× higher bandwidth than GDDR6and DDR5-based CXL memory architectures, respectively, under a module form-factor constraint. Second, we design a CXLPNM controller architecture integrated with an LLM inference accelerator, exploiting the unique capabilities of such CXL memory to overcome the disadvantages of competing technologies such as HBM-PIM and AxDIMM. Lastly, we implement a CXLPNM software stack that supports seamless and transparent use of CXL-PNM for Python-based LLM programs. Our evaluation shows that a CXL-PNM appliance with 8 CXL-PNM devices offers 23% lower latency, 31% higher throughput, and 2.8× higher energy efficiency at 30% lower hardware cost than a GPU appliance with 8 GPU devices for an LLM inference service.
items.abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的大型语言模型 (LLM)，例如生成式预训练 Transformer (GPT)，因其在文本生成和翻译等各种应用中的卓越性能而变得流行。对于LLM的训练和推理，GPU凭借其普遍的软件开发生态系统和强大的计算能力一直是主要的加速器。然而，随着 LLM 的规模不断增大以实现更高的性能和/或更复杂的应用，单个 GPU 由于其有限的内存容量而无法有效地加速 LLM 训练和推理，这需要频繁传输 GPU 所需的模型参数，以从主机 CPU 内存/存储中计算当前层。 GPU 设备可以通过多个 GPU 提供足够的聚合内存容量，但它会受到 GPU 设备之间频繁传输中间值的影响，每个设备都会加速给定 LLM 的特定层。由于这些模型参数和中间值的频繁传输是在相对较慢的设备到设备互连（例如 PCIe 或 NVLink）上执行的，因此它们成为 LLM 高效加速的关键瓶颈。我们专注于加速对许多商业服务至关重要的 LLM 推理，开发了 CXL-PNM，这是一个基于新兴互连技术 Compute eXpress Link (CXL) 的处理近内存 (PNM) 平台。具体来说，我们首先设计了一种基于 LPDDR5X 的 CXL 内存架构，容量为 512GB，带宽为 1.1TB/s，在模块外形尺寸限制下，其容量分别比基于 GDDR6 和基于 DDR5 的 CXL 内存架构高 16 倍和 10 倍。其次，我们设计了与 LLM 推理加速器集成的 CXLPNM 控制器架构，利用此类 CXL 内存的独特功能来克服 HBM-PIM 和 AxDIMM 等竞争技术的缺点。最后，我们实现了一个 CXLPNM 软件堆栈，支持对基于 Python 的 LLM 程序无缝且透明地使用 CXL-PNM。我们的评估表明，与具有 8 个 GPU 设备的用于 LLM 推理服务的 GPU 设备相比，具有 8 个 CXL-PNM 设备的 CXL-PNM 设备延迟降低了 23%，吞吐量提高了 31%，能源效率提高了 2.8 倍，硬件成本降低了 30%。

items.title: SmartDIMM: In-Memory Acceleration of Upper Layer Protocols.
items.abstract: There has been significant focus on offloading upperlayer network protocols (ULPs) to accelerators located on CPUs and SmartNICs. However, restricting accelerator placement to these locations limits both the variety of ULPs that can be accelerated and the overall performance. In particular, it overlooks the opportunity to accelerate ULPs running atop a stateful transport protocol in the face of high cache contention. That is, at high network rates, the frequent DRAM accesses and SmartNIC-CPU synchronizations outweigh the benefits of hardware acceleration. This work introduces SmartDIMM, which unlocks the opportunity for accelerating ULPs running atop stateful transport protocols that primarily operate on data stored in DRAM. We prototyped SmartDIMM using Samsung's AxDIMM and implemented endto-end offloading of (de/en)cryption and (de)compression– two ULPs widely employed in datacenters. We then compared the performance of SmartDIMM with accelerator placements on the CPU, SmartNIC, and PCIe cards. Our results demonstrate that ULP offloading on SmartDIMM outperforms CPU, SmartNIC and PCIe-based offload configurations. In comparison to a server executing (de/en)cryption and (de)compression on the CPU, SmartDIMM achieves 21.0% to 10.28 × higher requests per second and 36.3% to 88.9% lower memory bandwidth utilization.
items.abstract_zh: 人们非常关注将上层网络协议 (ULP) 卸载到位于 CPU 和 SmartNIC 上的加速器。然而，将加速器放置在这些位置限制了可加速的 ULP 的种类和整体性能。特别是，它忽视了在面临高缓存争用的情况下加速在有状态传输协议上运行的 ULP 的机会。也就是说，在高网络速率下，频繁的 DRAM 访问和 SmartNIC-CPU 同步超过了硬件加速的好处。这项工作引入了 SmartDIMM，它为加速在主要对 DRAM 中存储的数据进行操作的有状态传输协议上运行的 ULP 提供了机会。我们使用三星的 AxDIMM 制作了 SmartDIMM 原型，并实现了（解/加密）加密和（解）压缩（数据中心广泛采用的两种 ULP）的端到端卸载。然后，我们将 SmartDIMM 的性能与 CPU、SmartNIC 和 PCIe 卡上的加速器布置进行了比较。我们的结果表明，SmartDIMM 上的 ULP 卸载性能优于基于 CPU、SmartNIC 和 PCIe 的卸载配置。与在 CPU 上执行（解/加密）加密和（解）压缩的服务器相比，SmartDIMM 每秒的请求数提高了 21.0% 至 10.28 倍，内存带宽利用率降低了 36.3% 至 88.9%。

items.title: Morphling: A Throughput-Maximized TFHE-based Accelerator using Transform-domain Reuse.
items.abstract: Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) has become an increasingly important aspect in modern computing, particularly in preserving privacy in cloud computing by enabling computation directly on encrypted data. Despite its potential, FHE generally poses major computational challenges, including huge computational and memory requirements. The bootstrapping operation, which is essential particularly in Torus-Fhe(tfhe) scheme, involves intensive computations characterized by an enormous number of polynomial multiplications. For instance, performing a single bootstrapping at the 128-bit security level requires more than 10,000 polynomial multiplications. Our in-depth analysis reveals that domain-transform operations, i.e., Fast Fourier Transform (FFT), contribute up to 88% of these operations, which is the bottleneck of the TFHE system. To address these challenges, we propose Morphling, an accelerator architecture that combines the 2D systolic array and strategic use of transform-domain reuse in order to reduce the overhead of domain-transform in TFHE. This novel approach effectively reduces the number of required domain-transform operations by up to 83.3 %, allowing more computational cores in a given die area. In addition, we optimize its micro architecture design for end-to-end TFHE operation, such as merge-split pipelined-FFT for efficient domain-transform operation, double-pointer method for high-throughput polynomial rotation, and specialized buffer design. Furthermore, we introduce custom instructions for tiling, batching, and scheduling of multiple ciphertext operations. This facilitates software-hardware co-optimization, effectively mapping high-level applications such as XG-Boost classifier, Neural-Network, and VGG-9. As a result, Morphling, with four 2D systolic arrays and four vector units with domain-transform reuse, takes 74.79 mm<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup> die area and 53.00 W power consumption in 28nm process. It achieves a throughput of up to 147,615 bootstrappings per second, demonstrating improvements of 3440x over the CPU, 143x over the GPU, and 14.7x over the state-of-the-art TFHE accelerator. It can run various deep learning models with sub-second latency.
items.abstract_zh: 全同态加密 (FHE) 已成为现代计算中日益重要的一个方面，特别是通过直接对加密数据进行计算来保护云计算中的隐私。尽管 FHE 具有潜力，但它通常会带来重大的计算挑战，包括巨大的计算和内存需求。自举操作在 Torus-Fhe(tfhe) 方案中尤其重要，涉及以大量多项式乘法为特征的密集计算。例如，在 128 位安全级别执行一次引导需要超过 10,000 次多项式乘法。我们的深入分析表明，域变换操作，即快速傅里叶变换（FFT），占这些操作的比例高达 88%，这是 TFHE 系统的瓶颈。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 Morphling，这是一种加速器架构，它结合了 2D 脉动阵列和变换域重用的战略使用，以减少 TFHE 中域变换的开销。这种新颖的方法有效地将所需的域转换操作数量减少了高达 83.3%，从而在给定的芯片区域中允许更多的计算核心。此外，我们还针对端到端 TFHE 操作优化了其微架构设计，例如用于高效域变换操作的合并分割流水线 FFT、用于高吞吐量多项式旋转的双指针方法以及专门的缓冲区设计。此外，我们还引入了用于平铺、批处理和调度多个密文操作的自定义指令。这有助于软件-硬件协同优化，有效映射 XG-Boost 分类器、神经网络和 VGG-9 等高级应用程序。因此，具有四个 2D 脉动阵列和四个具有域变换重用功能的矢量单元的 Morphling 在 28nm 工艺中占用 74.79 mm<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup> 芯片面积和 53.00 W 功耗。它实现了每秒高达 147,615 次引导的吞吐量，比 CPU 提高了 3440 倍，比 GPU 提高了 143 倍，比最先进的 TFHE 加速器提高了 14.7 倍。它可以以亚秒级延迟运行各种深度学习模型。

items.title: MINOS: Distributed Consistency and Persistency Protocol Implementation & Offloading to SmartNICs.
items.abstract: To enable high-performance, programmable, and resilient distributed systems, Distributed Data Persistency (DDP) models provide specific data consistency and persistency guarantees. Since these models target leaderless systems (i.e., systems where any node can initiate requests), they deliver high performance and are scalable. However, they are also more complex. In this paper, we develop detailed distributed algorithms for DDP models. They support Linearizable consistency with five different types of persistency. We call these algorithms MINOSBaseline (MINOS-B) and evaluate them on a 5-node distributed machine. Additionally, to improve performance, we also redesign the algorithms to offload them to a new SmartNIC architecture. The resulting system is called MINOS-Offload (MINOS-O). The MINOS-O SmartNIC introduces optimizations such as selective data coherence in hardware between host and SmartNIC, message batching, and message broadcasting. Our evaluation shows that offloading is very beneficial. It substantially reduces request latency and increases request throughput for various workloads and number of nodes. For example, compared to MINOS-B, MINOS-O reduces the average end-to-end latency of two microservice functions by 35%.
items.abstract_zh: 为了实现高性能、可编程和弹性的分布式系统，分布式数据持久性 (DDP) 模型提供了特定的数据一致性和持久性保证。由于这些模型针对无领导者系统（即任何节点都可以发起请求的系统），因此它们提供高性能且可扩展。然而，它们也更复杂。在本文中，我们为 DDP 模型开发了详细的分布式算法。它们支持线性化一致性和五种不同类型的持久性。我们将这些算法称为 MINOSBaseline (MINOS-B)，并在 5 节点分布式机器上对其进行评估。此外，为了提高性能，我们还重新设计了算法，将它们卸载到新的 SmartNIC 架构。由此产生的系统称为 MINOS-Offload (MINOS-O)。 MINOS-O SmartNIC 引入了优化，例如主机和 SmartNIC 之间硬件中的选择性数据一致性、消息批处理和消息广播。我们的评估表明卸载是非常有益的。它大大减少了请求延迟并增加了各种工作负载和节点数量的请求吞吐量。例如，与MINOS-B相比，MINOS-O将两个微服务功能的平均端到端延迟降低了35%。

items.title: SACHI: A Stationarity-Aware, All-Digital, Near-Memory, Ising Architecture.
items.abstract: Recently there have been efforts to solve difficult computation problems harnessing or drawing inspiration from nature. A prominent example is the use of Ising machines for solving NP-complete problems [1], [23]. Ising machines have evolved from quantum/optical annealers and oscillator-based designs [1] to the recent CMOS-based Von-Neumann [36]/in-memory designs [35]. While prior works have demonstrated the power of Ising machines to solve complex real-world problems, the state-of-the-art Ising accelerators are dedicated accelerators that are useful only for a class of problems, involve complex data converter circuits (ADCs/DACs), are unreliable compared to the rest of the CMOS SoC due to the use of process-variation sensitive/specific embedded memory technologies. In this paper, we present an all-digital Ising architecture realized using repurposing of L1 cache of a CPU. It relies on processing in-memory technology implemented in SRAM. SACHI solves the reliability problems of prior works such as BRIM, eliminates the need for ADCs/DACs, and provides Ising compute acceleration with minor hardware overhead over a CPU pipeline. The novelty of the proposed approach consists of (i) tightly coupled interfacing of the accelerator to the CPU, (ii) reuse/ repurposing of existing hardware to provide acceleration, (iii) ability to achieve higher parallelism than earlier Ising designs due to reuse-aware compute, and (iv) improved performance/energy for a wide variety of large-sized high precision real-life optimization problems using novel compute/mapping strategies. In comparison to BRIM, the proposed all-digital Ising accelerator achieves (i) 36x, 160x, 286x, 300x better performance, (ii) 72x, 79x, 80x, and 75x improved energy, (iii) reuse of 4x, 32x, 200x, and 4000x is observed for asset allocation, molecular dynamics, image segmentation, and traveling salesman respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 最近，人们努力利用自然或从自然中汲取灵感来解决困难的计算问题。一个突出的例子是使用 Ising 机来解决 NP 完全问题 [1]、[23]。 Ising 机器已经从量子/光学退火器和基于振荡器的设计 [1] 发展到最近基于 CMOS 的冯·诺依曼 [36]/内存设计 [35]。虽然之前的工作已经证明了 Ising 机器解决复杂现实问题的能力，但最先进的 Ising 加速器是专用加速器，仅适用于一类问题，涉及复杂的数据转换器电路 (ADC/DAC)，由于使用了工艺变化敏感/特定的嵌入式内存技术，与 CMOS SoC 的其余部分相比并不可靠。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过重新利用 CPU 的 L1 缓存实现的全数字 Ising 架构。它依赖于 SRAM 中实现的内存处理技术。 SACHI 解决了 BRIM 等先前工作的可靠性问题，消除了对 ADC/DAC 的需求，并通过 CPU 管道以较小的硬件开销提供 Ising 计算加速。所提出方法的新颖性包括（i）加速器与CPU的紧密耦合接口，（ii）重用/重新利用现有硬件以提供加速，（iii）由于重用感知计算而能够实现比早期伊辛设计更高的并行性，以及（iv）使用新颖的计算/映射策略提高各种大型高精度现实优化问题的性能/能量。与 BRIM 相比，所提出的全数字 Ising 加速器实现了 (i) 36x、160x、286x、300x 更好的性能，(ii) 72x、79x、80x 和 75x 改进的能量，(iii) 在资产分配、分子动力学、图像分割和旅行推销员方面分别观察到 4x、32x、200x 和 4000x 的重用。

items.title: Enabling Large Dynamic Neural Network Training with Learning-based Memory Management.
items.abstract: Dynamic neural network (DyNN) enables high computational efficiency and strong representation capability. However, training DyNN can face a memory capacity problem because of increasing model size or limited GPU memory capacity. Managing tensors to save GPU memory is challenging, because of the dynamic structure of DyNN. We present DyNN-Offload, a memory management system to train DyNN. DyNN-Offload uses a learned approach (using a neural network called the pilot model) to increase predictability of tensor accesses to facilitate memory management. The key of DyNN-Offload is to enable fast inference of the pilot model in order to reduce its performance overhead, while providing high inference (or prediction) accuracy. DyNNOffload reduces input feature space and model complexity of the pilot model based on a new representation of DyNN; DyNNOffload converts the hard problem of making prediction for individual operators into a simpler problem of making prediction for a group of operators in DyNN. DyNN-Offload enables 8 × larger DyNN training on a single GPU compared with using PyTorch alone (unprecedented with any existing solution). Evaluating with AlphaFold (a production-level, large-scale DyNN), we show that DyNN-Offload outperforms unified virtual memory (UVM) and dynamic tensor rematerialization (DTR), the most advanced solutions to save GPU memory for DyNN, by 3 × and 2.1 × respectively in terms of maximum batch size.
items.abstract_zh: 动态神经网络（DyNN）计算效率高，表示能力强。然而，由于模型大小增加或 GPU 内存容量有限，训练 DyNN 可能会面临内存容量问题。由于 DyNN 的动态结构，管理张量以节省 GPU 内存具有挑战性。我们推出了 DyNN-Offload，一种用于训练 DyNN 的内存管理系统。 DyNN-Offload 使用学习方法（使用称为试点模型的神经网络）来提高张量访问的可预测性，以促进内存管理。 DyNN-Offload 的关键是实现引导模型的快速推理，以降低其性能开销，同时提供高推理（或预测）精度。 DyNNOffload 基于 DyNN 的新表示，减少了 Pilot 模型的输入特征空间和模型复杂度； DyNNOffload 将单个算子预测的难题转化为 DyNN 中一组算子预测的简单问题。与单独使用 PyTorch 相比，DyNN-Offload 在单个 GPU 上实现了 8 倍大的 DyNN 训练（任何现有解决方案都是前所未有的）。通过使用 AlphaFold（生产级大规模 DyNN）进行评估，我们发现 DyNN-Offload 在最大批量大小方面分别优于统一虚拟内存 (UVM) 和动态张量重物化 (DTR)（为 DyNN 节省 GPU 内存的最先进解决方案），分别提高了 3 倍和 2.1 倍。

items.title: Revet: A Language and Compiler for Dataflow Threads.
items.abstract: Spatial dataflow architectures such as reconfigurable dataflow accelerators (RDA) can provide much higher performance and efficiency than CPUs and GPUs. In particular, vectorized reconfigurable dataflow accelerators (vRDA) in recent literature represent a design point that enhances the efficiency of dataflow architectures with vectorization. Today, vRDAs can be exploited using either hard-coded kernels or MapReduce languages like Spatial, which cannot vectorize data-dependent control flow. In contrast, CPUs and GPUs can be programmed using general-purpose threaded abstractions. The ideal combination would be the generality of a threaded programming model coupled with the efficient execution model of a vRDA. We introduce Revet: a programming model, compiler, and execution model that lets threaded applications run efficiently on vRDAs. The Revet programming language uses threads to support a broader range of applications than prior parallel-patterns approaches, and our MLIR-based compiler lowers this language to a generic dataflow backend that operates on streaming tensors. Finally, we show that mapping threads to dataflow out-performs GPUs, the current state-of-the-art for threaded accelerators, by 3.8×.
items.abstract_zh: 可重构数据流加速器 (RDA) 等空间数据流架构可以提供比 CPU 和 GPU 高得多的性能和效率。特别是，最近文献中的矢量化可重构数据流加速器（vRDA）代表了通过矢量化提高数据流架构效率的设计点。如今，可以使用硬编码内核或 Spatial 等 MapReduce 语言来利用 vRDA，这些语言无法对数据相关的控制流进行矢量化。 In contrast, CPUs and GPUs can be programmed using general-purpose threaded abstractions. The ideal combination would be the generality of a threaded programming model coupled with the efficient execution model of a vRDA. We introduce Revet: a programming model, compiler, and execution model that lets threaded applications run efficiently on vRDAs. Revet 编程语言使用线程来支持比以前的并行模式方法更广泛的应用程序，并且我们基于 MLIR 的编译器将该语言降低为在流张量上运行的通用数据流后端。 Finally, we show that mapping threads to dataflow out-performs GPUs, the current state-of-the-art for threaded accelerators, by 3.8×.

items.title: START: Scalable Tracking for any Rowhammer Threshold.
items.abstract: The Rowhammer vulnerability is worsening, with the Rowhammer Threshold (T<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">RH</inf>) reducing from 139K to 4.8K activations over the last decade. As thresholds reduce further, the number of possible aggressor rows increases inversely, making it difficult to reliably track such rows in a storage-efficient manner for typical Rowhammer defenses. To be secure at lower thresholds, academic trackers like Graphene must dedicate prohibitively high storage (hundreds of KBs to MBs) at the chip's design time. Recent in-DRAM trackers from the industry, such as DSAC-TRR, perform approximate tracking and sacrifice guaranteed protection for reduced storage overheads, leaving DRAM vulnerable to Rowhammer attacks. Ideally, we seek a configurable tracker that is secure and precise, incurs negligible dedicated storage and performance overheads, and scales at deployment to track arbitrarily low thresholds. To that end, we propose START - a Scalable Tracker for Any Rowhammer Threshold. Rather than relying on dedicated SRAM structures, START dynamically repurposes a small fraction of the Last-Level Cache (LLC) to store tracking metadata. START leverages the observation that while the memory contains millions of rows, typical workloads touch only a small subset of rows within a refresh period of 64ms. Thus, allocating tracking entries on demand reduces storage significantly. If the application does not access many rows in memory, START does not reserve any LLC capacity. Otherwise, START dynamically uses 1-way, 2-way, or 8-way of the cache set based on demand. START consumes, on average, 9.4% of the LLC capacity to store metadata, which is 5 × lower compared to dedicating a counter in LLC for each row in memory. We also propose START-M, a memory-mapped START for large-memory systems. Our designs require only 4KB SRAM for newly added structures and perform within 1% of idealized tracking even at T<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">RH</inf> of less than 100.
items.abstract_zh: Rowhammer 漏洞正在恶化，Rowhammer 阈值 (T<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">RH</inf>) 在过去十年中从 139K 激活减少到 4.8K。随着阈值进一步降低，可能的攻击者行的数量反而增加，这使得典型的 Rowhammer 防御难以以高效存储的方式可靠地跟踪此类行。为了在较低阈值下确保安全，像 Graphene 这样的学术跟踪器必须在芯片设计时投入极高的存储空间（数百 KB 到 MB）。业内最新的 DRAM 跟踪器（例如 DSAC-TRR）执行近似跟踪并牺牲有保证的保护以减少存储开销，从而使 DRAM 容易受到 Rowhammer 攻击。理想情况下，我们寻求一种安全且精确的可配置跟踪器，专用存储和性能开销可以忽略不计，并且可以在部署时进行扩展以跟踪任意低的阈值。为此，我们提出 START - 适用于任何 Rowhammer 阈值的可扩展跟踪器。 START 不依赖专用的 SRAM 结构，而是动态地重新利用末级缓存 (LLC) 的一小部分来存储跟踪元数据。 START 利用了这样的观察结果：虽然内存包含数百万行，但典型的工作负载在 64 毫秒的刷新周期内仅触及一小部分行。因此，按需分配跟踪条目可显着减少存储空间。如果应用程序不访问内存中的许多行，则 START 不会保留任何 LLC 容量。否则，START 根据需要动态使用 1-way、2-way 或 8-way 缓存集。 START 平均消耗 9.4% 的 LLC 容量来存储元数据，这比在 LLC 中为内存中的每一行专用一个计数器低 5 倍。我们还提出了 START-M，一种用于大内存系统的内存映射 START。我们的设计仅需要 4KB SRAM 用于新添加的结构，即使在 T<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">RH</inf> 小于 100 时，其性能也能达到理想化跟踪的 1% 以内。

items.title: GPU Scale-Model Simulation.
items.abstract: The continuously increasing GPU system scale and compute capabilities, i.e., increasing number of streaming multiprocessors (SMs), caches, on-chip and off-chip memory bandwidth, pose a major challenge for performance evaluation methodologies. Architectural simulation is time-consuming and resource-intensive, and because of simulator and/or simulation host infrastructure limitations, it might not even be possible to simulate large-scale systems. Scale-model simulation is a recently proposed performance prediction methodology to predict large-scale system performance based on (much smaller) scale models. Prior work in scale-model simulation for general-purpose multicore CPUs and specialized graph analytics accelerators, unfortunately, cannot be readily applied to GPUs because different GPU applications exhibit vastly different scaling behavior with system size, thereby breaking the one-size-fits-all regression models deployed in prior work. This paper proposes a GPU scale-model simulation methodology that leverages performance measurements of two scale models alongside a miss rate curve to predict GPU target system performance. A key asset of GPU scale-model simulation is that it does not require access to a simulation model of the target system, unlike prior work in simulation acceleration. Our experimental evaluation demonstrates the accuracy of GPU scale-model simulation for both strong-scaling and weak-scaling workload scenarios. Under strong scaling, the performance of a 128-SM target system is predicted within 4% error on average, and at most 17%, using 8-SM and 16-SM scale models. Under weak scaling, the performance of a 128-SM target system is estimated with an average error of 1.7%, and at most 4.5%, while yielding a 9.3× simulation time speedup. We furthermore demonstrate how scale-model simulation predicts multi-chiplet GPU performance with an average error of 2.5% (and at most 4.3%). Alternate solutions are substantially less accurate.
items.abstract_zh: GPU系统规模和计算能力的不断提高，即流式多处理器（SM）、缓存、片内和片外内存带宽数量的增加，对性能评估方法提出了重大挑战。架构模拟非常耗时且资源密集，并且由于模拟器和/或模拟主机基础设施的限制，甚至可能无法模拟大型系统。比例模型仿真是最近提出的一种性能预测方法，用于基于（小得多的）比例模型来预测大规模系统性能。遗憾的是，之前针对通用多核 CPU 和专用图形分析加速器的比例模型模拟工作无法轻易应用于 GPU，因为不同的 GPU 应用程序随系统大小表现出截然不同的缩放行为，从而打破了之前工作中部署的一刀切的回归模型。本文提出了一种 GPU 比例模型模拟方法，该方法利用两个比例模型的性能测量以及缺失率曲线来预测 GPU 目标系统性能。 GPU 比例模型仿真的一个关键优势是，与之前的仿真加速工作不同，它不需要访问目标系统的仿真模型。我们的实验评估证明了 GPU 比例模型模拟对于强扩展和弱扩展工作负载场景的准确性。在强缩放下，使用 8-SM 和 16-SM 缩放模型预测 128-SM 目标系统的性能平均误差在 4% 以内，最高可达 17%。在弱缩放下，128-SM 目标系统的性能估计平均误差为 1.7%，最多为 4.5%，同时产生 9.3 倍的仿真时间加速。我们还演示了比例模型模拟如何预测多芯片 GPU 性能，平均误差为 2.5%（最多 4.3%）。替代解决方案的准确度要低得多。

items.title: Guser: A GPGPU Power Stressmark Generator.
items.abstract: Power stress mark is crucial for estimating Thermal Design Power (TDP) of GPGPUs to ensure efficient power control. This paper proposes Guser, the first systematic methodology to generate GPGPU power stressmarks. It features three ideas: Instruction Power Analysis (IPA) to analyze the power behavior of PTX instructions; Pipeline-based Instruction Grouping (PIG) to classify all PTX instructions into a number of groups; and Quantifying the Importance of power impact factors (QIF) to select a small number but important adjustable knobs. We adopt Optuna, an advanced BO algorithm, to generate stressmarks that maximize power consumption. We evaluate Guser on two real GPGPUs Tesla T4 (Turing) and Tesla A10 (Ampere). The experimental results show that the Guser-generated stressmark for T4 (T4-stresser) consumes 109.3 watts and the one for A10 (A10-stresser) consumes 238.7 watts, which are 48.7% and 73% higher than those consumed by the stressmarks generated by the state-of-the-art approach for CPUs, respectively. Moreover, T4-stresser and A10-stresser consume significantly more power than that consumed by any benchmarks in three benchmark suites: Cactus, Rodinia, and Parboil.
items.abstract_zh: 功率应力标记对于估算 GPGPU 的热设计功耗 (TDP) 以确保高效的功率控制至关重要。本文提出了 Guser，这是第一个生成 GPGPU 功率压力标记的系统方法。它具有三个想法： 指令功耗分析（IPA），用于分析 PTX 指令的功耗行为；基于管道的指令分组（PIG），将所有 PTX 指令分为多个组；量化功率影响因子 (QIF) 的重要性，以选择数量较少但重要的可调旋钮。我们采用先进的 BO 算法 Optuna 来生成最大化功耗的压力标记。我们在两个真实的 GPGPU Tesla T4 (Turing) 和 Tesla A10 (Ampere) 上评估 Guser。实验结果表明，Guser 生成的 T4 压力标记（T4-stresser）功耗为 109.3 瓦，A10 生成的压力标记（A10-stresser）功耗为 238.7 瓦，分别比最先进的 CPU 方法生成的压力标记消耗的功耗高 48.7% 和 73%。此外，T4-stresser 和 A10-stresser 消耗的电量明显多于三个基准测试套件（Cactus、Rodinia 和 Parboil）中任何基准测试消耗的电量。

items.title: BitWave: Exploiting Column-Based Bit-Level Sparsity for Deep Learning Acceleration.
items.abstract: Bit-serial computation facilitates bit-wise sequential data processing, offering numerous benefits, such as a reduced area footprint and dynamically-adaptive computational precision. It has emerged as a prominent approach, particularly in leveraging bit-level sparsity in Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). However, existing bit-serial accelerators exploit bit-level sparsity to reduce computations by skipping zero bits, but they suffer from inefficient memory accesses due to the irregular indices of the non-zero bits. As memory accesses typically are the dominant contributor to DNN accelerator performance, this paper introduces a novel computing approach called “bit-column-serial” and a compatible architecture design named “BitWave.” BitWave harnesses the advantages of the “bit-column-serial” approach, leveraging structured bit-level sparsity in combination with dynamic dataflow techniques. This achieves a reduction in computations and memory footprints through redundant computation skipping and weight compression. BitWave is able to mitigate the performance drop or the need for retraining that is typically associated with sparsity-enhancing techniques using a post-training optimization involving selected weight bit-flips. Empirical studies conducted on four deep-learning benchmarks demonstrate the achievements of BitWave: (1) Maximally realize 13.25x higher speedup, 7.71 x efficiency compared to state-of-the-art sparsity-aware accelerators. (2) Occupying 1.138 mm<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup> area and consuming 17.56 mW power in 16nm FinFet process node.
items.abstract_zh: 位串行计算有助于按位顺序数据处理，提供许多好处，例如减少占地面积和动态自适应计算精度。它已成为一种重要的方法，特别是在利用深度神经网络 (DNN) 中的位级稀疏性方面。然而，现有的位串行加速器利用位级稀疏性通过跳过零位来减少计算量，但由于非零位的不规则索引，它们会遭受低效的内存访问。由于内存访问通常是 DNN 加速器性能的主要贡献者，因此本文介绍了一种名为“位列串行”的新颖计算方法和一种名为“BitWave”的兼容架构设计。 BitWave 利用“位列串行”方法的优势，将结构化位级稀疏性与动态数据流技术相结合。这通过冗余计算跳过和权重压缩来减少计算和内存占用。 BitWave 能够使用涉及选定权重位翻转的训练后优化来减轻通常与稀疏性增强技术相关的性能下降或重新训练的需要。对四个深度学习基准进行的实证研究证明了 BitWave 的成就：（1）与最先进的稀疏感知加速器相比，最大程度地实现了 13.25 倍的加速比和 7.71 倍的效率。 (2) 16nm FinFet工艺节点占用1.138 mm<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup>面积，功耗17.56 mW。

items.title: Computational CXL-Memory Solution for Accelerating Memory-Intensive Applications.
items.abstract: CXL interface is the up-to-date technology that enables effective memory expansion by providing a memory-sharing protocol in configuring heterogeneous devices. However, its limited physical bandwidth can be a significant bottleneck for emerging data-intensive applications. In this work, we propose a novel CXL-based memory disaggregation architecture with a real-world prototype demonstration, which overcomes the bandwidth limitation of the CXL interface using near-data processing. The experimental results demonstrate that our design achieves up to 1.9× better performance/power efficiency than the existing CPU system.
items.abstract_zh: CXL接口是最新的技术，通过在配置异构设备时提供内存共享协议来实现有效的内存扩展。然而，其有限的物理带宽可能成为新兴数据密集型应用程序的重大瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 CXL 的内存分解架构，并进行了真实世界的原型演示，该架构利用近数据处理克服了 CXL 接口的带宽限制。实验结果表明，我们的设计比现有 CPU 系统的性能/功效提高了 1.9 倍。

items.title: ECO-CHIP: Estimation of Carbon Footprint of Chiplet-based Architectures for Sustainable VLSI.
items.abstract: Decades of progress in energy-efficient and low-power design have successfully reduced the operational carbon footprint in the semiconductor industry. However, this has led to increased embodied emissions, arising from design, manufacturing, and packaging. While existing research has developed tools to analyze embodied carbon for traditional monolithic systems, these tools do not apply to near-mainstream heterogeneous integration (HI) technologies. HI systems offer significant potential for sustainable computing by minimizing carbon emissions through two key strategies: “reducing” computation by “reusing” pre-designed chiplet IP blocks and adopting hierarchical approaches to system design. The reuse of chiplets across multiple designs, even spanning multiple generations of ICs, can substantially reduce carbon emissions throughout the lifespan. This paper introduces ECO-CHIP, a carbon analysis tool designed to assess the potential of HI systems toward sustainable computing by considering scaling, chip let, and packaging yields, design complexity, and even overheads associated with advanced packaging techniques. Experimental results from ECO-CHIP demonstrate that HI can reduce embodied carbon emissions by up to 30% compared to traditional monolithic systems. ECO-CHIP is integrated with other chiplet simulators and is applied to chiplet disaggregation considering other metrics such as power, area, and cost. ECO-CHIP suggests that HI can pave the way for sustainable computing practices.
items.abstract_zh: 节能和低功耗设计数十年的进步已成功减少了半导体行业的运营碳足迹。然而，这导致设计、制造和包装产生的隐含排放量增加。虽然现有研究已经开发出分析传统整体系统隐含碳的工具，但这些工具不适用于近乎主流的异构集成（HI）技术。 HI 系统通过两个关键策略最大限度地减少碳排放，从而为可持续计算提供了巨大的潜力：通过“重用”预先设计的小芯片 IP 块来“减少”计算，以及采用分层系统设计方法。在多种设计中重复使用小芯片，甚至跨越多代 IC，可以大幅减少整个生命周期的碳排放。本文介绍了 ECO-CHIP，这是一种碳分析工具，旨在通过考虑扩展、芯片组和封装产量、设计复杂性，甚至与先进封装技术相关的管理费用来评估 HI 系统实现可持续计算的潜力。 ECO-CHIP 的实验结果表明，与传统整体系统相比，HI 可以减少高达 30% 的隐含碳排放。 ECO-CHIP 与其他小芯片模拟器集成，并应用于考虑其他指标（例如功耗、面积和成本）的小芯片分解。 ECO-CHIP 表明 HI 可以为可持续计算实践铺平道路。

items.title: A Quantum Computer Trusted Execution Environment.
items.abstract: We present the first architecture for a trusted execution environment for quantum computers. In the architecture, to protect the user's circuits, they are obfuscated with decoy control pulses added during circuit transpilation by the user. The decoy pulses are removed, i.e. attenuated, by the trusted hardware inside the superconducting quantum computer's fridge before they reach the qubits. This preliminary work demonstrates that protection from possibly malicious cloud providers is feasible with minimal hardware cost.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了第一个用于量子计算机的可信执行环境的架构。在该架构中，为了保护用户的电路，它们被用户在电路转换期间添加的诱饵控制脉冲所混淆。诱饵脉冲在到达量子位之前会被超导量子计算机冰箱内的可信硬件去除（即衰减）。这项初步工作表明，以最低的硬件成本来防范可能的恶意云提供商是可行的。

items.title: Are Superpages Super-fast? Distilling Flash Blocks to Unify Flash Pages of a Superpage in an SSD.
items.abstract: This work discovers a flash memory performance issue resulting from flash superpages organization. Because of process variation, each flash page has its own read/write performance. If a slow page is grouped with a fast page in a superpage unit, computer systems with solid-state drives (SSD) receive a poor performance result. In this work, we prove the existence of this issue by conducting a series of experiments on a real SSD platform. To resolve this issue, we characterize flash memory chips to find hints to organize super-fast superpages in SSDs. By the tips, this work develops a process-variation check scheme (PV Check) that can group a superpage with an optimized performance at runtime with low overheads. According to our experiments, the PV Check scheme has encouraged results in performance improvement. Compared with a traditional method, our work can decrease the extra program and erase latency by 16.61% and 34.55%, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 这项工作发现了闪存超级页面组织导致的闪存性能问题。由于工艺差异，每个闪存页都有自己的读/写性能。如果将慢速页面与快速页面组合在超级页面单元中，则具有固态驱动器 (SSD) 的计算机系统会收到较差的性能结果。在这项工作中，我们通过在真实的 SSD 平台上进行一系列实验来证明这个问题的存在。为了解决这个问题，我们对闪存芯片进行了表征，以找到在 SSD 中组织超快超级页面的提示。根据提示，这项工作开发了一种过程变化检查方案（PV Check），该方案可以在运行时以较低的开销对具有优化性能的超级页面进行分组。根据我们的实验，PV Check 方案对性能改进起到了促进作用。与传统方法相比，我们的工作可以将额外的编程和擦除延迟分别减少 16.61% 和 34.55%。

items.title: TALCO: Tiling Genome Sequence Alignment Using Convergence of Traceback Pointers.
items.abstract: Pairwise sequence alignment is one of the most fundamental and computationally intensive steps in genome analysis. With the improving costs and throughput of third-generation sequencing technologies and the growing availability of whole-genome datasets, longer alignments are becoming more common in the field of bioinformatics. However, the high memory demands of long alignments create significant obstacles to hardware acceleration. Banding techniques allow recovering high-quality alignments with lower memory, but they also require more memory for long alignments than what is typically available on-chip in hardware accelerators. Recently, tiling-based hardware accelerators have made remarkable strides in accelerating sequence alignment, achieving three to four orders of magnitude improvement in alignment throughput over software tools without any restrictions on alignment length. However, it is crucial to note that existing tiling heuristics can cause the alignment quality to degrade, which is a critical concern for the wider adoption of accelerators in the field of bioinformatics. To address this issue, this paper describes TALCO - a novel method for tiling long sequence alignments, that, similar to prior tiling techniques, maintains a constant memory footprint during the acceleration step independent of alignment length. However, unlike previous techniques, TALCO also ensures optimal alignments under banding constraints. TALCO does this by leveraging the convergence of traceback paths beyond a tile to a single point on the boundary of that tile - a strategy that generalizes well to a broad set of sequence alignment algorithms. We demonstrate the advantages of TALCO by applying it to two different and widely-used banded sequence alignment algorithms, X-Drop and WFA-Adapt. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that a tiling technique is being applied to a non-classical algorithm for sequence alignment, such as WFA-Adapt. The TALCO tiling strategy is beneficial to both software and hardware. When implemented in software, the TALCO strategy reduces the memory requirements for X-Drop and WFA-Adapt algorithms by up to 39 × and 57 ×, respectively, and when implemented as ASIC accelerator, it provides up to 1,900 × and 2,000 × improvement in alignment throughput/watt over CPU baselines implementing the same algorithms. Compared to state-of-the-art GPU and ASIC baselines implementing tiling heuristics, TALCO provides up to 50 × and 1.1 × improvement in alignment throughput, respectively, while also maintaining a higher alignment quality. Code availability: https://github.com/TurakhiaLab/TALCO.
items.abstract_zh: 成对序列比对是基因组分析中最基本且计算密集的步骤之一。随着第三代测序技术的成本和通量的提高以及全基因组数据集的可用性不断增加，更长的比对在生物信息学领域变得越来越普遍。然而，长对齐的高内存需求对硬件加速造成了重大障碍。分段技术允许使用较低的内存恢复高质量的对齐，但与硬件加速器中通常可用的片上内存相比，它们也需要更多的内存来进行长对齐。最近，基于平铺的硬件加速器在加速序列比对方面取得了显着的进步，与软件工具相比，比对吞吐量提高了三到四个数量级，且对比对长度没有任何限制。然而，值得注意的是，现有的平铺启发式方法可能会导致比对质量下降，这是生物信息学领域更广泛采用加速器的一个关键问题。为了解决这个问题，本文介绍了 TALCO——一种用于平铺长序列比对的新方法，该方法与之前的平铺技术类似，在加速步骤期间保持恒定的内存占用，与比对长度无关。然而，与以前的技术不同，TALCO 还可以确保在条带约束下实现最佳对齐。 TALCO 通过利用从图块到该图块边界上的单个点的回溯路径的收敛来实现这一点 - 这种策略可以很好地推广到广泛的序列比对算法。我们通过将 TALCO 应用于两种不同且广泛使用的带状序列比对算法 X-Drop 和 WFA-Adapt 来展示 TALCO 的优势。据我们所知，这是第一次将平铺技术应用于非经典序列比对算法，例如 WFA-Adapt。 TALCO 平铺策略对软件和硬件都有好处。在软件中实施时，TALCO 策略可将 X-Drop 和 WFA-Adapt 算法的内存需求分别降低多达 39 倍和 57 倍，而当作为 ASIC 加速器实施时，与实施相同算法的 CPU 基线相比，它可将对齐吞吐量/瓦特提高高达 1,900 倍和 2,000 倍。与实现平铺启发式的最先进的 GPU 和 ASIC 基线相比，TALCO 的对齐吞吐量分别提高了 50 倍和 1.1 倍，同时还保持了更高的对齐质量。代码可用性：https://github.com/TurakhiaLab/TALCO。

items.title: GRIT: Enhancing Multi-GPU Performance with Fine-Grained Dynamic Page Placement.
items.abstract: Multi-GPU systems have become popular to cater to the growing demands for high parallelism and large memory capacity. However, the delivered performance is constrained by the non-uniform memory access (NUMA) overhead arising from data sharing and communication across multiple GPUs. Recent multi-GPUs employ unified virtual memory (UVM) to simplify the programming effort. In UVM-enabled multi-GPUs, three popular page placement schemes are adopted to mitigate the NUMA overheads: i) on-touch page migration, ii) access counter-based migration, and iii) page duplication. However, we observe that the preferred page placement scheme varies across i) different applications, ii) different pages of the same application, and iii) even different execution phases of a single page, making it challenging to find a “one-size-fits-all” page placement scheme. To this end, we propose GRIT, which dynamically and automatically determines the appropriate page placement schemes at runtime in a fine-grained manner to enhance multi-GPU performance and scalability. Experimental results indicate that GRIT achieves an average of 60%, 49%, and 29% performance improvements over uniformly adopting on-touch migration, access counter-based migration, and page duplication, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 多 GPU 系统已变得流行，以满足对高并行性和大内存容量不断增长的需求。然而，所提供的性能受到多个 GPU 之间的数据共享和通信所产生的非均匀内存访问 (NUMA) 开销的限制。最近的多 GPU 采用统一虚拟内存 (UVM) 来简化编程工作。在支持 UVM 的多 GPU 中，采用三种流行的页面放置方案来减轻 NUMA 开销：i) 触摸页面迁移，ii) 基于访问计数器的迁移，以及 iii) 页面复制。然而，我们观察到，首选的页面放置方案在 i) 不同的应用程序、ii) 同一应用程序的不同页面以及 iii) 甚至单个页面的不同执行阶段之间有所不同，这使得找到“一刀切”的页面放置方案具有挑战性。为此，我们提出了 GRIT，它在运行时以细粒度的方式动态自动确定适当的页面放置方案，以增强多 GPU 性能和可扩展性。实验结果表明，与统一采用触摸迁移、基于访问计数器的迁移和页面复制相比，GRIT 的性能平均分别提高了 60%、49% 和 29%。

items.title: LearnedFTL: A Learning-Based Page-Level FTL for Reducing Double Reads in Flash-Based SSDs.
items.abstract: We present LearnedFTL, a new on-demand pagelevel flash translation layer (FTL) design, which employs learned indexes to improve the address translation efficiency of flashbased SSDs. The first of its kind, it reduces the number of double reads induced by address translation in random read accesses. LearnedFTL proposes three key techniques: an in-place-update linear model to build learned indexes efficiently, a virtual PPN representation to obtain contiguous PPNs for sorted LPNs, and a group-based allocation and model training via GC/rewrite strategy to reduce the training overhead. By tightly integrating the aforementioned key techniques, LearnedFTL considerably speeds up address translation while reducing the number of flash read accesses caused by the address translation. Our extensive experiments on a FEMU-based prototype show that LearnedFTL can reduce up to 55.5% address translation-induced double reads. As a result, LearnedFTL reduces the P99 tail latency by 2.9× ∼ 12.2× with an average of 5.5× and 8.2× compared to the state-of-the-art TPFTL and LeaFTL schemes, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出 LearnedFTL，这是一种新的按需页面级闪存转换层 (FTL) 设计，它采用学习索引来提高基于闪存的 SSD 的地址转换效率。它是同类产品中的第一个，它减少了随机读取访问中由地址转换引起的双重读取的数量。 LearnedFTL 提出了三种关键技术：有效构建学习索引的就地更新线性模型、为排序的 LPN 获取连续 PPN 的虚拟 PPN 表示，以及通过 GC/重写策略进行基于组的分配和模型训练以减少训练开销。通过紧密集成上述关键技术，LearnedFTL 显着加快了地址转换速度，同时减少了地址转换引起的闪存读取访问次数。我们在基于 FEMU 的原型上进行的大量实验表明，LearnedFTL 可以减少高达 55.5% 的地址转换引起的重复读取。因此，与最先进的 TPFTL 和 LeaFTL 方案相比，LearnedFTL 将 P99 尾部延迟减少了 2.9× ∼ 12.2×，平均分别减少了 5.5× 和 8.2×。

items.title: BeaconGNN: Large-Scale GNN Acceleration with Out-of-Order Streaming In-Storage Computing.
items.abstract: Prior in-storage computing (ISC) solutions show fundamental drawbacks when applied to GNN acceleration. First, they obey a strict ordering of GNN neighbor sampling. Such serialization fails to utilize flash internal parallelism. Second, the I/Osizes generated by GNN are much smaller than the minimum flash access granularity. The limited channel bandwidth is wasted when serving the requests. Third, the prior solutions rely on firmware-based request processing, making the backend I/O throughput constrained by the embedded core processing power. To address these challenges, we propose BeaconGNN, an in-storage computing (ISC) design for GNN that supports both large-scale graph structures and feature tables. First, it utilizes a novel graph format to enable out-of-order GNN neighbor sampling, improving flash resource utilization. Second, it deploys near-data processing engines across multiple levels of the flash hierarchy (i.e., controller, channel, and die). Specifically, flash-die-level samplers perform neighbor samplings while reducing channel transfer simultaneously. Flash-channel-level command routers communicate with backend dies without the involvement of flash firmware. Lastly, a spatial accelerator is attached to the device bus to accelerate GNN computation. With our software and hardware co-design, BeaconGNN achieves up to 11.6x higher throughput and 4 x better energy efficiency than the state-of-the-art ISC design.
items.abstract_zh: 先前的存储内计算 (ISC) 解决方案在应用于 GNN 加速时显示出根本性的缺陷。首先，它们遵循 GNN 邻居采样的严格顺序。这种串行化无法利用闪存内部并行性。其次，GNN 生成的 I/O 大小远小于最小闪存访问粒度。在服务请求时浪费了有限的信道带宽。第三，现有的解决方案依赖于基于固件的请求处理，使得后端I/O吞吐量受到嵌入式核心处理能力的限制。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 BeaconGNN，这是一种 GNN 的存储内计算（ISC）设计，支持大规模图结构和特征表。首先，它利用一种新颖的图形格式来实现无序 GNN 邻居采样，从而提高闪存资源利用率。其次，它跨闪存层次结构的多个级别（即控制器、通道和芯片）部署近数据处理引擎。具体来说，闪存芯片级采样器执行相邻采样，同时减少通道传输。闪存通道级命令路由器与后端芯片进行通信，无需闪存固件的参与。最后，空间加速器连接到设备总线以加速 GNN 计算。通过我们的软件和硬件协同设计，BeaconGNN 的吞吐量比最先进的 ISC 设计高出 11.6 倍，能源效率高出 4 倍。

items.title: Modeling, Derivation, and Automated Analysis of Branch Predictor Security Vulnerabilities.
items.abstract: With the intensification of microarchitectural side-channel attacks targeting branch predictors, the security boundary of computer systems and users' security-critical data are under serious threat. Since the root cause of these attacks is the neglect of security issues in the microarchitecture design of branch predictors, an analysis framework that can exhaustively and automatically explore these concerns in the design phase is imminent. In this paper, we propose a comprehensive and automated evaluation framework for inspecting the security guarantees of branch predictors at the microarchitecture design stage. Our technique involves a three-step modeling approach that abstractly characterizes 19 branch predictor states and 53 operations that could affect these states. Subsequently, we develop a symbolic execution-based framework to investigate all three-step combinations and derive 156 valid attack patterns against branch predictors, including 89 novel attacks never considered in the previous work. Finally, we apply our framework to 8 secure branch predictor designs and four typical hardware-based countermeasures against speculative execution attacks to evaluate their security capabilities. The result demonstrates that these security branch predictors provide efficient security guarantees and outperform those hardware-based alleviations against speculative execution attacks, indicating that the security branch predictors are promising in mitigating branch predictor security vulnerabilities.
items.abstract_zh: 随着针对分支预测器的微架构侧通道攻击的加剧，计算机系统的安全边界和用户的安全关键数据受到严重威胁。由于这些攻击的根本原因是分支预测器微架构设计中忽视了安全问题，因此一种能够在设计阶段详尽、自动地探索这些问题的分析框架迫在眉睫。在本文中，我们提出了一个全面的自动化评估框架，用于在微架构设计阶段检查分支预测器的安全保证。我们的技术涉及三步建模方法，该方法抽象地描述了 19 个分支预测器状态和可能影响这些状态的 53 个操作。随后，我们开发了一个基于符号执行的框架来研究所有三步组合，并得出针对分支预测器的 156 种有效攻击模式，其中包括以前的工作中从未考虑过的 89 种新颖攻击。最后，我们将我们的框架应用于 8 个安全分支预测器设计和四种典型的基于硬件的针对推测执行攻击的对策，以评估其安全能力。结果表明，这些安全分支预测器提供了有效的安全保证，并且优于那些针对推测执行攻击的基于硬件的缓解措施，这表明安全分支预测器在减轻分支预测器安全漏洞方面很有前景。

items.title: Data Motion Acceleration: Chaining Cross-Domain Multi Accelerators.
items.abstract: There has been an arms race for devising accelerators for deep learning in recent years. However, real-world applications are not only neural networks but often span across multiple domains, e.g., database queries, compression, encryption, video coding, signal processing, and traditional machine learning, which may or may not contain deep learning. The sole focus on this single domain is sub-optimal as it misses the potential to proliferate and promote cross-domain multi-acceleration as there is an opportunity to harness the power of chaining heterogeneous Domain-Specific Architectures (DSAs) in modern datacenter applications. However, there is a catch as the data motion overhead can outweigh the benefits from all these chained heterogeneous accelerators. We dub the data restructuring and communication overhead of executing a single application using a chain of accelerators [1] as the data motion overhead. In a stark contrast with most works on DSAs that deal with accelerating compute kernels, this work focuses on accelerating data motion within a chain of heterogeneous DSAs in a multi-accelerator datacenter. To that end, this paper introduces Data Motion Acceleration (DMX) for (1) reducing data movement, (2) accelerating data restructuring, and (3) enabling interoperability between heterogeneous accelerators from different domains through a cross-stack hardware-software solution. The results with five end-to-end applications show that utilizing DMX offers up to 8.2 ×, 13.6 ×, and 5.2 × improvement in latency, throughput, and energy efficiency in a multi-accelerator system, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习加速器的设计展开了一场军备竞赛。然而，现实世界的应用不仅是神经网络，而且通常跨越多个领域，例如数据库查询、压缩、加密、视频编码、信号处理和传统机器学习，其中可能包含也可能不包含深度学习。仅仅关注这个单一域是次优的，因为它错过了扩散和促进跨域多重加速的潜力，因为有机会在现代数据中心应用程序中利用链接异构特定域架构（DSA）的力量。然而，有一个问题，因为数据移动开销可能超过所有这些链式异构加速器的好处。我们将使用加速器链 [1] 执行单个应用程序的数据重组和通信开销称为数据移动开销。与大多数处理加速计算内核的 D​​SA 工作形成鲜明对比，这项工作重点关注在多加速器数据中心的异构 DSA 链内加速数据移动。为此，本文引入了数据运动加速 (DMX)，用于 (1) 减少数据移动，(2) 加速数据重组，以及 (3) 通过跨堆栈硬件-软件解决方案实现不同领域的异构加速器之间的互操作性。五个端到端应用的结果表明，利用 DMX 在多加速器系统中的延迟、吞吐量和能源效率分别提高了 8.2 倍、13.6 倍和 5.2 倍。

items.title: Mitigating Write Disturbance in Non-Volatile Memory via Coupling Machine Learning with Out-of-Place Updates.
items.abstract: Non-volatile memory (NVM) opens up new opportunities to resolve scaling restrictions of main memory, yet it is still hindered by the write disturbance (WD) problem. The WD problem mistakenly transforms the values of NVM cells, hence seriously deteriorating memory reliability and downgrading access performance. Existing studies mainly mitigate the WD problem via encoding WD-prone data patterns under in-place updates, yet we find that when turning to out-of-place updates, they can gain the potential to reduce more WD errors. We present LearnWD, an approach that mitigates the WD problem in NVM via coupling machine learning with out-of-place updates. LearnWD first employs clustering algorithms to classify the stale data based on the error proneness. To perform a write operation, LearnWD carefully examines the aggressivity of new data and the error proneness of stale data, so as to speculatively minimize the resulting WD errors. We conduct extensive experiments using 15 real-world data sets with different data types, showing that LearnWD can assist a variety of data encoding schemes to further reduce 20.1% of WD errors, shorten 11.0% of write latency, and extend 21.9% of write endurance.
items.abstract_zh: 非易失性存储器（NVM）为解决主存储器的扩展限制提供了新的机会，但它仍然受到写干扰（WD）问题的阻碍。 WD问题错误地转换了NVM单元的值，从而严重恶化了存储器的可靠性并降低了访问性能。现有研究主要通过在就地更新下编码易发生 WD 的数据模式来缓解 WD 问题，但我们发现，当转向异地更新时，它们可以获得减少更多 WD 错误的潜力。我们提出了 LearnWD，这是一种通过将机器学习与异地更新相结合来缓解 NVM 中的 WD 问题的方法。 LearnWD 首先采用聚类算法根据错误倾向对陈旧数据进行分类。为了执行写入操作，LearnWD 会仔细检查新数据的攻击性和过时数据的错误倾向，以便推测性地最小化由此产生的 WD 错误。我们使用 15 个不同数据类型的真实数据集进行了大量实验，结果表明 LearnWD 可以辅助多种数据编码方案，进一步减少 20.1% 的 WD 错误，缩短 11.0% 的写入延迟，并延长 21.9% 的写入耐久性。

items.title: LightPool: A NVMe-oF-based High-performance and Lightweight Storage Pool Architecture for Cloud-Native Distributed Database.
items.abstract: Emerging cloud-native distributed databases rely on local NVMe SSDs to provide high-performance and highavailable data services to many cloud applications. However, the database clusters suffer from low utilization of local storage because of the imbalance between CPU and storage capacities within each node. For instance, the OceanBase distributed database cluster, with hundreds of PB local storage capacity, only utilizes around 40% of its local storage. Although disaggregated storage (EBS) can enhance storage utilization by provisioning the CPU and storage independently on demand, they suffer from performance bottlenecks and high costs. In this paper, we propose LightPool, a high-performance and lightweight storage pool architecture large-scale deployed in the OceanBase clusters, enhancing storage resource utilization. The key idea of LightPool is aggregating cluster storage into a storage pool and enabling unified management. In particular, LightPool adopts NVMe-oF to enable high-performance storage resource sharing among cluster nodes and integrate the storage pool with Kubernetes to achieve flexible management and allocation of storage resources. Furthermore, we design the hot-upgrade and hot-migration mechanisms to enhance the availability of LightPool. We have deployed LightPool on over 8500 nodes in production clusters. Statistics show that LightPool can improve storage resource utilization from about 40% to 65%. Experimental results show that the extra latency from LightPool is only about 2.1 μs compared to local storage. Compared to OpenEBS, LightPool enhances bandwidth up to 190.9% in microbenchmarks and throughput up to 6.9% in real-world applications. LightPool is the best practice to deploy NVMe-oF (NVMe/TCP) in the production environment. We also discuss important lessons and experiences learned from the development of LightPool.
items.abstract_zh: 新兴的云原生分布式数据库依靠本地NVMe SSD为众多云应用提供高性能、高可用的数据服务。然而，由于各节点内CPU和存储容量不平衡，数据库集群的本地存储利用率较低。例如，OceanBase分布式数据库集群，拥有数百PB的本地存储容量，但本地存储利用率仅为40%左右。虽然分解存储（EBS）可以通过按需独立配置CPU和存储来提高存储利用率，但它们存在性能瓶颈和高昂的成本。在本文中，我们提出了LightPool，一种高性能、轻量级的存储池架构，大规模部署在OceanBase集群中，提高存储资源利用率。 LightPool的核心思想是将集群存储聚合到存储池中并实现统一管理。特别是，LightPool采用NVMe-oF，实现集群节点之间高性能存储资源共享，并将存储池与Kubernetes集成，实现存储资源的灵活管理和分配。此外，我们还设计了热升级和热迁移机制来增强LightPool的可用性。我们已在生产集群中的 8500 多个节点上部署了 LightPool。据统计，LightPool可以将存储资源利用率从40%左右提高到65%。实验结果表明，与本地存储相比，LightPool 的额外延迟仅为 2.1 μs 左右。与 OpenEBS 相比，LightPool 在微基准测试中将带宽提高了 190.9%，在实际应用中将吞吐量提高了 6.9%。 LightPool是在生产环境中部署NVMe-oF（NVMe/TCP）的最佳实践。我们还讨论了 LightPool 开发中的重要教训和经验。

items.title: Data Enclave: A Data-Centric Trusted Execution Environment.
items.abstract: Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) protect sensitive applications in the cloud with the minimal trust in the cloud provider. Existing TEEs with integrity protection however lack support for data management primitives, causing data sharing between enclaves either insecure or cumbersome. This paper proposes a new data abstraction for TEEs, data enclave. As a data-centric abstraction, data enclave is decoupled from an enclave's existence, is equipped with flexible secure permission controls, and crytographically isolated. It eliminates the hurdles for enclaves to cooperate efficiently, and at the same time, enables dynamic shrinking of the height of integrity tree for performance. This paper presents this new abstraction, its properties, and the architecture support. Experiments on synthetic benchmarks and three real-world applications all show that data enclave can help improve the efficiency of enclaves and inter-enclave cooperations significantly while enhancing the security protection.
items.abstract_zh: 可信执行环境 (TEE) 以对云提供商的最低信任度来保护云中的敏感应用程序。然而，现有的具有完整性保护的 TEE 缺乏对数据管理原语的支持，导致 enclave 之间的数据共享不安全或麻烦。本文提出了一种新的 TEE 数据抽象，即数据飞地。作为以数据为中心的抽象，数据飞地与飞地的存在解耦，配备灵活的安全权限控制，并进行密码隔离。它消除了 enclave 高效协作的障碍，同时能够动态收缩完整性树的高度以提高性能。本文介绍了这种新的抽象、其属性和体系结构支持。综合基准​​测试和三个实际应用的实验都表明，数据飞地可以帮助显着提高飞地和飞地间合作的效率，同时增强安全保护。

items.title: Exploitation of Security Vulnerability on Retirement.
items.abstract: The backend of the processor executes the μops decoded from the frontend out of order, while the retirement is responsible for retiring completed μops in the Reorder Buffer in order. Consequently, the retirement may stall differently depending on the execution time of the first instruction in the Reorder Buffer. Moreover, since retirement is shared between two logical cores on the same physical core, an attacker can deduce the instructions executed on the other logical core by observing the availability of its own retirement. Based on this finding, we introduce two novel covert channels: the Different Instructions covert channel and the Same Instructions covert channel, which can transmit information across logical cores and possess the ability to bypass the existing protection strategies. Furthermore, this paper explores additional applications of retirement. On the one hand, we propose a new variant of Spectre v1 by applying the retirement to the Spectre attack using the principle that the fallback penalty of misprediction is related to the instructions speculated to be executed. On the other hand, based on the principle that different programs result in varied usage patterns of retirement, we propose an attack method that leverages the retirement to infer the program run by the victim. Finally, we discuss possible mitigations against new covert channels.
items.abstract_zh: 处理器的后端乱序执行从前端解码的μop，而退出负责按顺序退出重新排序缓冲区中已完成的μop。因此，根据重排序缓冲区中第一条指令的执行时间，引退可能会有所不同。此外，由于报废是在同一物理核心上的两个逻辑核心之间共享的，因此攻击者可以通过观察自己报废的可用性来推断在另一个逻辑核心上执行的指令。基于这一发现，我们引入了两种新颖的隐蔽通道：不同指令隐蔽通道和相同指令隐蔽通道，它们可以跨逻辑核心传输信息，并具有绕过现有保护策略的能力。此外，本文还探讨了退休的其他应用。一方面，我们提出了 Spectre v1 的新变体，利用错误预测的后备惩罚与推测要执行的指令相关的原则，将退休应用于 Spectre 攻击。另一方面，基于不同的程序导致不同的退休使用模式的原理，我们提出了一种利用退休来推断受害者运行的程序的攻击方法。最后，我们讨论针对新的隐蔽通道的可能缓解措施。

items.title: Spatial Variation-Aware Read Disturbance Defenses: Experimental Analysis of Real DRAM Chips and Implications on Future Solutions.
items.abstract: Read disturbance in modern DRAM chips is a widespread phenomenon and is reliably used for breaking memory isolation, a fundamental building block for building robust systems. RowHammer and RowPress are two examples of read disturbance in DRAM where repeatedly accessing (hammering) or keeping active (pressing) a memory location induces bitflips in other memory locations. Unfortunately, shrinking technology node size exacerbates read disturbance in DRAM chips over generations. As a result, existing defense mechanisms suffer from significant performance and energy overheads, limited effectiveness, or prohibitively high hardware complexity.
